description: Patterns that attempt to override agent instructions or inject new directives

patterns.description: Attempts to inject or override system prompt instructions
patterns.regex: (?i)(you are now|ignore (?:all )?(?:previous|prior|above) (?:instructions|prompts|directives)|new instructions:|system prompt:|<\/?system>|\[SYSTEM\]|OVERRIDE:|from now on you (?:are|will|must|should))

patterns.description: Attempts to change the agent's role or persona
patterns.regex: (?i)(you are (?:a |an )?(?:helpful|harmless|honest)|act as (?:a |an )?|pretend (?:to be|you are)|your (?:new )?role is|switch to .* mode|enter .* mode|you must (?:now |always )?(?:obey|follow|comply))

patterns.description: Hidden instructions in HTML comments, zero-width characters, or encoded content
Attempts to break out of content context using common delimiters
